# FormatInput

A text field preset for email, URL, or telephone — sets type, inputMode, and autocomplete.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/format-input
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="format-input"
  example={0}
  code={`<FormatInput aria-label="Email" format="email" placeholder="you@stalk-ui.com" />`}
/>

```tsx
<FormatInput aria-label="Email" format="email" placeholder="you@stalk-ui.com" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="format-input"
  example={1}
  code={`<FormatInput aria-label="Website" format="url" placeholder="https://stalk-ui.com" />`}
/>

```tsx
<FormatInput aria-label="Website" format="url" placeholder="https://stalk-ui.com" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="format-input"
  example={2}
  code={`<FormatInput aria-label="Email" format="email" showValidity placeholder="Type a valid email" />`}
/>

```tsx
<FormatInput aria-label="Email" format="email" showValidity placeholder="Type a valid email" />
```

## Props

| Prop           | Type                                                                      | Required | Default | Description                                                           |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `align`        | `InputAlign`                                                              | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `className`    | `string`                                                                  | No       | -       | Root className.                                                       |
| `format`       | `InputFormat`                                                             | Yes      | -       | Selects the input semantics: type, inputMode, and autocomplete token. |
| `invalid`      | `boolean`                                                                 | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `rootProps`    | `Omit<InputRootProps, 'children' \| 'className' \| 'disabled' \| 'size'>` | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `showValidity` | `boolean`                                                                 | No       | -       | Show a success check once the field holds a valid, non-empty value.   |
| `size`         | `InputSize`                                                               | No       | -       | -                                                                     |
| `validLabel`   | `string`                                                                  | No       | -       | Accessible label announced alongside the validity check.              |
